OUR ESSENCE & STORY

Crafting Infrastructure of Excellence

Founded in Sri Lanka, Mahdev Pvt Ltd has grown from a specialized technology company to a diversified corporate syndicate. We operate at the intersection of logical software architectures and creative luxury design.

2016

Inception

Began as a small bespoke web and custom IT solutions team.

2019

Launch of SWS Events & Studio U1

Expanded into premium photography & high-end wedding planning.

2022

Mahdev ERP Rollout

Released POS terminals, cloud inventory, and omnichannel software suites.

2025

Global Integrations

Partnering internationally with cloud-native frameworks and Firebase architectures.

Our Vision

To be the world’s most versatile conglomerate, setting premium benchmarks in digital system integrations and luxury experience creation.

Our Mission

To engineer robust backend architectures for businesses while translating client wedding and travel narratives into lifetime memories.

Featured Project

SWS Weddings Gala, Colombo

Curating royal church decorations, fairy light lanes, and floral canopies for premium venues.

ELITE BUSINESS SUITES

Operate at the Highest Level

Explore our distinct operational divisions. Each engineered by subject-matter experts to deliver top-tier market standards.

Luxury Decor

SWS Event Management

Bespoke luxury wedding planning, stage set designs, church floral setups, and corporate galas with premium decoration schemes.

EXPLORE DIVISION
Cinematography

Studio U1

Cinematic visual storytelling. Capturing raw emotional energy using high-altitude drone cameras, luxury studio setups, and newborn/outdoor shoots.

EXPLORE DIVISION
Enterprise SaaS

Mahdev ERP Systems

Double-entry bookkeeping, smart multi-warehouse inventory tracking, thermal printer POS checkouts, and specialized modules for schools, hotels & restaurants.

EXPLORE DIVISION
Software Engine

IT & Cloud Solutions

Custom enterprise software engineering, high-fidelity UI/UX design, AWS/Azure server orchestration, and result-oriented digital marketing strategies.

EXPLORE DIVISION
Luxury Tourism

Mahdev Travels

Premier passenger vans, luxury VIP wedding cars, and curated vacation tour packages across Sri Lanka with professional English chauffeurs.

EXPLORE DIVISION

OUR UNIQUE ADVANTAGE

Why Elite Companies Choose Mahdev

We merge standard architectural precision with luxury design guidelines to create products that scale and spaces that inspire.

Certified Excellence

Award-winning software implementations and premium wedding planner associations across South Asia.

Bank-Grade Security

Our ERP systems implement end-to-end data encryption and strict Firestore rules to secure transaction ledgers.

Hyper-Performance

Using cutting-edge stacks like Next.js and Firebase Client SDK to deliver page loads under 1 second.

Proven Track Record

Successfully delivered over 1,200 projects, from custom inventory warehouses to large cinematic movies.

Dedicated Account Managers

Direct consultation pipelines for SWS wedding couples, Travels clients, and IT project stakeholders alike.

24/7 Engineering Support

Proactive server monitoring, automated daily cloud database backups, and instant WhatsApp support pipelines.

CLIENT TESTIMONIALS

Trusted by Leaders Across Industries

"Mahdev Pvt Ltd decorated our daughter’s wedding in Colombo and it looked like a literal palace! The marigold arches and fairy lighting was absolutely breathtaking. Simultaneously, we automated our retail store billing with their POS ERP system. Outstanding multi-skilled team!"

Rajesh Singhania

Managing Director, Singhania Jewellers
